title: Mob Capture ORB
description: Lets you capture a mob so mob is stored in the orb so you can carry it with you then release
body:
MobCapture Capture & Release Mobs

MobCapture is a small add-on that lets you capture mobs into a portable item and release them later. It is simple to use and craftable with common materials.

 

How to capture

  1. Hold a Capture Orb in your hand.
  2. Throw it at a mob (use / right-click / tap). If the capture succeeds the mob is removed and you will receive a Release Orb.

How to release

  1. Select the Release Orb in your hotbar.
  2. Use it (press use / right-click / tap). The stored mob will spawn near you with a short particle effect.

Crafting

Place 1 Ender Pearl in the center of the crafting grid and surround it with 8 Glass. The recipe produces 4 Capture Orbs.

[   ] [ G ] [   ]
[ G ] [ E ] [ G ]
[   ] [ G ] [   ]

Where: G = Glass, E = Ender Pearl

Commands (testing)

/give @s mobcapture:mob_capture_orb 4
/give @s mobcapture:mob_release_orb 1
